app_info.subtitle: Lists and tasks
app_info.description: Convy helps households use ChatGPT to inspect household context, shopping lists, shopping items, tasks, and recent activity, with limited confirmed actions to create and complete shopping items and tasks.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns household selection context visible to the authorized user without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns household summary, member roles, list counts, and latest activity without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy household data for the authorized user.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns shopping and task lists for an authorized household without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy list data and does not contact public or third-party write surfaces.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, or modify lists.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns shopping items for an authorized list without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy shopping item data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, complete, edit, or create shopping items.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns tasks for an authorized task list without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy task data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, complete, edit, or create tasks.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns recent household activity visible to the authorized user without changing Convy data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private Convy activity data.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke, or modify any Convy record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates one private shopping item in a Convy list after user confirmation and an idempotency key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes one private Convy shopping item completion state after user confirmation and an idempotency key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes one private Convy shopping item back to pending after user confirmation and an idempotency key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates one private task in a Convy task list after user confirmation and an idempotency key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes one private Convy task completion state after user confirmation and an idempotency key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes one private Convy task back to pending after user confirmation and an idempotency key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Convy account and cannot publish to public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, archive, overwrite, invite, revoke, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Show the households available to the user.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns available households and indicates whether a household selection is required.

test_cases.description: List shopping and task lists for a household.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my Convy shopping and task lists.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns concise list records for the selected or default household.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show pending items in my grocery list.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns pending shopping items from the requested list with concise item details.
Returns pending tasks from the requested task list with concise task details.

test_cases.description: Create a shopping item after confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Add milk to my Convy grocery list.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation, then creates one shopping item and returns the created item ID.

test_cases.description: Complete a shopping item after confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Mark milk as complete in Convy.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation, then marks the selected shopping item completed.

test_cases.description: Create and complete a task after confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a task to clean the kitchen, then mark it done.
test_cases.expected_output: Requests confirmation for each write and updates only the private Convy task list.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar data is outside Convy's supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete all completed shopping items from Convy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not perform deletion because delete tools are not exposed.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Invite my friend to my Convy household.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke any tool because invitations and household membership management are out of scope.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not access admin or backup data.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me Convy admin metrics and the latest database backup.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not invoke tools because admin metrics and backups are not available through MCP.
